# Copilot review instructions

The [`docs/decision-log/`](../docs/decision-log/) tree is the source of truth for project conventions. Read the subdirectory relevant to the changed files and enforce every rule.

- Git, PRs, commits, merges: [`docs/decision-log/git/`](../docs/decision-log/git/)
- Toolchain and version pinning: [`docs/decision-log/toolchain/`](../docs/decision-log/toolchain/)
- Architecture: [`docs/decision-log/architecture/`](../docs/decision-log/architecture/)
- Doc boundaries (decision-log vs spec vs skill): [`docs/decision-log/doc-types.md`](../docs/decision-log/doc-types.md)

Flag violations. Propose the smallest fix.
